mechanics.excerpt: C bills are accepted virtually everywhere , without the conversion penalties that may accrue using H-bill accounts in aother realm The high cost of these accounts_ however blanket fee of 10,000 Cbills per year usually restricts them trading companies; mercenary units and other large groups rather than private individuals frequent traveler may also carry certified card, which does not have corresponding account: Instead_ funds are ComStar C bills make up roughly ten percent of the currency in the Inner Sphere Originally intended as medium of payment for ComStar'$ services they have become widely accepted across the Inner Sphere and Periphery; serving as second currency in most states: As the stablest of the Inner Sphere currencies the C bill is ideal for internationa transactions Some have sug; gested adopting the C bill as the currency of the new Star League_ but this dea has met with considerable resistance.
